meaning: n.[微]青霉素(一种抗菌素,音译名为盘尼西林)
examples: He was treated with penicillin injections.
One dose of penicillin can wipe out the infection.
Farmers often give penicillin to beef and poultry, and because of this, penicillin has been found in the milk of treated cows.
Non-food causes include wasp or bee stings, rubber, penicillin and other drugs or injections.
Remember Alexander Fleming's discovery of penicillin, probably the most important medical breakthrough this century?
